architectureDecision.label: Minimal PR set
architectureDecision.rationale: Combine compatible scenarios in one PR where paths do not mix; separate PRs only when required; each scenario still gets run URL plus job summary.

readyReview.decision: Minimal PR set for six scenarios; evidence is Actions run URL plus selected/skipped job summary per scenario.

technicalBreakdown: Plan PRs: evidence/status-only, docs/governance-only, extension-only, code, release-branch, publish dispatch.
Combine scenarios only when changed paths stay in one classifier bucket.
Record run URL and workflow job summary (selected vs skipped) in task completion notes.
Confirm no regression in task publish/hydrate paths unrelated to CI.

acceptanceCriteria: Evidence/status-only scenario: run URL + job summary showing classifier + aggregator only.
Docs-only and extension-only scenarios: focused groups run; run URL + summary attached.
Code scenario: build/check/test/smoke as expected; run URL + summary attached.
Release and publish scenarios: full parity/artifact path; run URL + summary attached.
Scenarios executed via minimal PR set (combined where compatible); local-only validation insufficient.
